task_completion.description: Create a new item in Jurism with the type set to Manuscript
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jurism interface showing a newly created item in the center pane, with the right-hand info pane displaying 'Manuscript' in the 'Item Type' field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Title and Author metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Title' field contains exactly 'Notes of Debates in the Federal Convention of 1787' and the 'Author' field contains 'Madison' (Last) and 'James' (First).

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Date, Place, and Manuscript Type metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Date' field shows '1787', the 'Place' field shows 'Philadelphia', and the 'Manuscript Type' field shows 'Autograph manuscript'.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct Archive and Location in Archive metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Archive' field shows 'Library of Congress' and the 'Loc. in Archive' field shows 'James Madison Papers, Series 1, Box 1'.
In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Abstract' field contains 'The original handwritten notes taken by James Madison during the Constitutional Convention.'

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Jurism graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Jurism application window with its standard layout (collections pane, items list, and item details pane) being used, rather than a text editor or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to directly modify the Jurism SQLite database
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows or SQLite command-line interfaces are visible showing direct SQL INSERT commands for the Jurism database.

integrity.description: The agent populated the fields within the application's native input boxes
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is visible inside the proper input fields of the Jurism right-hand info pane, with appropriate field labels (Title, Author, Abstract, etc.) visible next to them.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The item must be cataloged as a 'Manuscript'. Verified expected values: Title: 'Notes of Debates in the Federal Convention of 1787'; Author: James Madison; Place: Philadelphia; Archive: Library of Congress; Manuscript Type: Autograph manuscript. Note: Although historical records show the manuscript is actually in Series 5, Subseries 5E, the agent MUST use the exact metadata provided in the task description ('James Madison Papers, Series 1, Box 1') for the 'Loc. in Archive' field to be scored as correct.
